# Codex distilled implementation recipe from user screenshots - Overview

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: React UI, Tailwind UI, CSS prototype, AI generated frontend, premium web app
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/liquid-glass-css-recipe

Visual traits:
- CSS glass material
- blurred backdrop
- inner highlight
- outer rim
- colored caustics
- soft shadow

Use when:
- React UI
- Tailwind UI
- CSS prototype
- AI generated frontend
- premium web app

Avoid when:
- massive lists
- hundreds of repeated rows
- print layout
- strict high contrast mode only

AI summary: For web implementation of Liquid Glass, create reusable glass primitives using translucent gradients, backdrop-filter blur/saturate, rounded capsules, inner highlights, layered shadows, pseudo-element gloss, and chromatic caustic glints; add fallbacks and contrast safeguards.

content:
# Codex distilled implementation recipe from user screenshots - Layout Rules

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: React UI, Tailwind UI, CSS prototype, AI generated frontend, premium web app
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/liquid-glass-css-recipe

- Use CSS variables for glass opacity, blur radius, rim color, and accent glow so the style can be themed consistently.
- Build one reusable glass primitive, then vary radius, size, and accent color for buttons, inputs, cards, and modals.
- Combine pseudo-elements for top-left gloss and bottom-right chromatic glint.

AI summary: For web implementation of Liquid Glass, create reusable glass primitives using translucent gradients, backdrop-filter blur/saturate, rounded capsules, inner highlights, layered shadows, pseudo-element gloss, and chromatic caustic glints; add fallbacks and contrast safeguards.

# Codex distilled implementation recipe from user screenshots - Accessibility Notes

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: React UI, Tailwind UI, CSS prototype, AI generated frontend, premium web app
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/liquid-glass-css-recipe

- Provide @supports fallback when backdrop-filter is unavailable.
- Respect prefers-reduced-transparency or provide a high-contrast variant.
- Do not animate blur radius aggressively on low-end devices.

AI summary: For web implementation of Liquid Glass, create reusable glass primitives using translucent gradients, backdrop-filter blur/saturate, rounded capsules, inner highlights, layered shadows, pseudo-element gloss, and chromatic caustic glints; add fallbacks and contrast safeguards.

source_name: Codex distilled implementation recipe from user screenshots
content:
# Codex distilled implementation recipe from user screenshots - Implementation Hints

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: React UI, Tailwind UI, CSS prototype, AI generated frontend, premium web app
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/liquid-glass-css-recipe

- Core CSS: background: linear-gradient(... rgba white/transparent ...); backdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(1.35); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.55); box-shadow: outer shadow plus inset white highlight plus inset dark lower edge.
- Gloss layer: ::before with white translucent linear/radial gradient positioned top-left, opacity around .55, pointer-events none.
- Caustic layer: ::after with cyan/magenta/orange radial gradients near corners, mix-blend-mode screen, low opacity.
- Text: use strong contrast; avoid pale gray on pale glass.
- Performance: limit backdrop-filter surfaces and avoid applying it to hundreds of table rows.

AI summary: For web implementation of Liquid Glass, create reusable glass primitives using translucent gradients, backdrop-filter blur/saturate, rounded capsules, inner highlights, layered shadows, pseudo-element gloss, and chromatic caustic glints; add fallbacks and contrast safeguards.
